title: cordia crassifolia
intro: Cordia crassifolia, also known as the white cordia or buttonwood, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cordia crassifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cordia crassifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
